assertion_results.text: Duplicate check searches for sibling issues using JQL with the CVE label and excludes the current issue key (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md line 5 shows the JQL query: 'project = TC AND labels = "CVE-2026-31812" AND issuetype = 10024 AND key != TC-8003'. This searches for sibling issues using the CVE label and explicitly excludes the current issue key TC-8003 with 'key != TC-8003'.

assertion_results.text: Duplicate check correctly classifies TC-7999 as a same-stream sibling (both have stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2]) and identifies it as a duplicate (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md lines 15-24: 'Current issue: TC-8003, stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2], stream 2.2.x' and 'Sibling issue: TC-7999, stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2], stream 2.2.x'. Line 18: 'TC-7999 has the same stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2] as TC-8003. Both issues track CVE-2026-31812 for the 2.2.x version stream.' Line 24: 'Classification: TC-8003 is a same-stream duplicate of TC-7999.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing TC-8003 as Duplicate with resolution 'Duplicate', referencing TC-7999 as the original (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 4: 'TC-8003 ... is a same-stream duplicate of TC-7999 and should be closed.' Line 34: 'Transition TC-8003 to Closed with resolution "Duplicate"'. duplicate-check.md line 49: 'Close TC-8003 as Duplicate of TC-7999.' TC-7999 is clearly referenced as the original issue throughout.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting why it is a duplicate — same CVE tracked for the same stream (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md line 57: 'Add comment to TC-8003: "Duplicate of TC-7999 -- same CVE tracked for the same stream [rhtpa-2.2]. Version impact analysis confirms overlap."' triage-outcome.md lines 33-34 repeat this proposed comment with additional detail: 'TC-7999 is In Progress with Affects Versions [RHTPA 2.2.0, RHTPA 2.2.1].'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT proceed to remediation task creation — duplicate detection short-circuits the triage flow
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 20: 'Steps 5-8 | Not reached. Duplicate closure terminates triage.' Line 18: 'Step 3 -- Affects Versions Correction | Not executed. Duplicate detection in Step 4 supersedes Affects Versions correction since the issue will be closed.' Line 27: 'Creating additional remediation tasks from TC-8003 would duplicate work already tracked under TC-7999.' No remediation task files exist in the outputs directory. The flow short-circuits after Step 4.
